enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the connection between two souls.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Keladi Kanmani, this song reflects the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.J. Yesudhas and Uma Ramanan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nee Pathi Naan Pathi Kanne was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on July 27, 1990.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Pathi Naan Pathi Kanne, the poignant lyrics and soothing melody evoke a sense of deep love and yearning. Featured in the film Keladi Kanmani, the song encapsulates the emotional turmoil of the characters as they navigate their feelings for each other. The harmonious blend of K.J. Yesudhas and Uma Ramanan's voices, coupled with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This classic continues to resonate with audiences, making it a cherished piece of Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Pathi Naan Pathi Kanne from Keladi Kanmani is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.J. Yesudhas and Uma Ramanan, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and Ilaiyaraaja's mesmerizing composition. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with listeners even decades after its release.
stanzaMeanings: You are half and I am half; my dear, you cannot sleep without me near you.
If you are not here, then I am not here; you are my life.
You are half and I am half; my dear, you cannot sleep without me near you.
If you think of the sky bird living, it will open the door to happiness.
If you think of the singing bird, it will bring a sweet song to your hands.
The turmeric will bloom in my heart, and it will have meaning because of you.
Your gentle smile will shine like a pearl, revealing the beauty of the past.
The truth is that life is real and it cannot be hidden.
If the left eye falls, the right eye will also blend in.
Even in darkness, I will come through the shadow until the end.
What is heaven for? My golden world is beside the woman; come, my dear.
This heart is my garden, and my king has come to it; come, my dear.
You are the taste of a sweet and pleasant experience.
You are half and I am half; my dear, you cannot sleep without me near you.
You are half and I am half; my dear, you cannot sleep without me near you.
